Hi there, I am Liam Ogilvie

DJ & Producer, DevOps Engineer, and Digital Creative from Toronto, Canada. I love exploring the intersection of technology and art. Some of my current passions include: Live Show Visuals, DIY Microcontroller synths, and a good book!
